name: Ring of Shooting Stars
description:
You can cast {@spell Dancing Lights|XPHB} or {@spell Light|XPHB} from the ring.
The ring has 6 charges and regains {@dice 1d6} expended charges daily at dawn. You can expend its charges to use the properties below.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Faerie Fire", "entries": ["You can expend 1 charge to cast {@spell Faerie Fire|XPHB} from the ring."]}
{"type": "entries", "name": "Lightning Spheres", "entries": ["You can expend 2 charges as a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to create up to four 3-foot-diame
